title: Desert Update (PixelDarks Version)
description: This mod adds some additional stuff to the desert. It adds Palm and Baobab Trees, some Mobs and a new ore
body: Desert with some trees (Palm and Baobab), some mobs (Meerkat, Ostrich and Vulture), some Building Blocks, a new Village, Prickly Pears (including Prickly Pear Crop) and Coconuts, a new Ore (Amber), and a new set of Equipment: Amber Armor and Amber Tools. There is a new Block called Fragmenter (it works only with Amber Staff), it converts Amber to Amber Shards. With them you can craft Amber Tools and Amber Armor. Palm includes a new set of Wood. There are Palm Boats, Palm Boats with chest and new Signs.
